summary: P0 Batch + AI Model Upgrade Testing Complete. Backend: 20/20 tests PASSED. AI model upgrade verified: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (default) returns 300+ word proposals with model='anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6', Claude Opus 4.6 (premium=true) returns 350+ word proposals with model='anthropic/claude-opus-4-6'. All Phase A/B/C/D regression endpoints working. Frontend: AI buttons verified (✨ Generate with AI + 👑 Premium AI with gradient), PaFinancialSummary component renders correctly at proposal_paid/awaiting_final_approval/case_created stages, DropoffRecoveryWidget lazy-loads via IntersectionObserver, Admin optimistic UI forms present.
feature: AI Model Upgrade (Claude Sonnet 4.6 + Opus 4.6) + Optimistic UI + PaFinancialSummary Refactor + DropoffWidget Lazy-Load

frontend_tests.partner_ai_generate_button: PASS - data-testid=ai-generate-btn, text='✨ Generate with AI'
frontend_tests.partner_ai_premium_button: PASS - data-testid=ai-premium-btn, text='👑 Premium AI', gradient background
frontend_tests.partner_ai_sonnet_generation: PASS - Toast shows 'AI draft ready · 342 words · claude-sonnet-4-6'
frontend_tests.partner_ai_opus_generation: PASS - Toast shows 'Premium draft ready · 378 words · claude-opus-4-6'
frontend_tests.partner_proposal_ai_textarea: PASS - data-testid=proposal-ai-text fills with generated text
frontend_tests.partner_financial_summary_awaiting_final: PASS - data-testid=fin-summary-{paId}, Total Received badge, 2-col fee breakdown
frontend_tests.partner_financial_summary_case_created: PASS - Shows Proposal PDF, Invoice PDF, Send Invoice buttons
frontend_tests.partner_awaiting_final_approval_banner: PASS - Indigo banner 'Submitted to Admin · Awaiting Final Approval'
frontend_tests.dropoff_widget_lazy_load: PASS - IntersectionObserver triggers fetch when widget enters viewport

critical_code_review_comments: ai_proposal.py correctly uses claude-sonnet-4-6 (default) and claude-opus-4-6 (premium=true) via emergentintegrations library
PreAssessmentPipeline.jsx correctly implements optimistic UI with snapshot rollback on failure
PreAssessmentQueue.jsx correctly implements optimistic UI for admin approve/reject and approve-final
PaFinancialSummary.jsx correctly extracted as separate component, renders at proposal_paid/awaiting_final_approval/case_created stages
DropoffRecoveryWidget.jsx correctly uses useRef + IntersectionObserver for lazy-loading

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and flows verified

seed_data_creation: Created 1 test PA during testing: TEST_Iteration84_Client (new stage)

mocked_apis.ai: AI is REAL (Claude API via Emergent LLM key) - Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.6 both working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 84 verified P0 batch: (1) AI model upgrade - POST /api/ai-proposal/generate now uses claude-sonnet-4-6 by default and claude-opus-4-6 when premium=true, response includes model and premium fields; (2) Optimistic UI - PreAssessmentPipeline.jsx and PreAssessmentQueue.jsx use snapshot arrays for rollback on API failure, toast shows ' — reverted' suffix; (3) PaFinancialSummary refactor - extracted to /app/frontend/src/components/pa/PaFinancialSummary.jsx, renders at proposal_paid/awaiting_final_approval/case_created stages with Total Received badge, 2-col fee breakdown, upsells list, proposal notes, 3 action buttons (dl-proposal-{paId}, dl-invoice-{paId}, send-invoice-{paId}); (4) DropoffRecoveryWidget lazy-load - uses IntersectionObserver with rootMargin='100px', shows 'Scroll to load drop-off insights…' placeholder until widget enters viewport.

optimistic_ui_verified.partner_send_proposal: Stage changes to 'proposal_sent' instantly, form closes, rollback on failure
optimistic_ui_verified.partner_forward_to_admin: Stage changes to 'under_review' instantly, rollback on failure
optimistic_ui_verified.partner_submit_final: Stage changes to 'awaiting_final_approval' instantly, rollback on failure
optimistic_ui_verified.admin_approve_reject: Stage changes to 'approved'/'rejected' instantly, rollback on failure
optimistic_ui_verified.admin_approve_final: Stage changes to 'case_created' instantly, rollback on failure
